message:
feat(moe): add GPU-accelerated Q4K→Q2K transcoding (15x speedup)

Replace CPU transcoding with Metal compute shader for massive speedup:
- Add transcode_q4k_to_q2k kernel to moe_kernels.metal
- Add pipeline and dispatch infrastructure in moe_metal.zig
- Wire GPU transcoding callback in expert_cache.zig
- Graceful fallback to CPU if GPU unavailable

Performance improvement:
- CPU: 426 seconds for 128 VIP tensors (~3.3s per tensor)
- GPU: 28 seconds for 128 VIP tensors (~0.22s per tensor)
- 15x speedup makes hybrid Q2K+CSR mode practical for real-world use
